title: Tariff Management
subtitle: Manage global, concession, and customer-level tariff rates

global.title: Global Rate
global.help: This is the default rate applied when no concession or customer override exists.

countryFees.title: Connection & Readyboard Fees
countryFees.subtitle: Country-level one-off fees. Used by the SMS / manual payment classifier.
countryFees.help: A customer paying exactly the connection or readyboard fee is auto-tagged for finance verification rather than credited as kWh. After the fee is verified, future payments of the same amount route normally.

lowBalance.title: Low balance SMS (kWh)
lowBalance.subtitle: Country-specific thresholds for automated low-balance text messages. Lesotho and Benin each use their own backend database.
lowBalance.help: When remaining balance falls to the warn level, customers may receive low-balance SMS up to the max-per-day count (per local calendar day in this country’s timezone). Counters reset when balance rises above the clear level. Balance callback limits are configured separately below.

smsGateway.title: SMS gateway — balance callbacks
smsGateway.subtitle: Limits on GET /api/payments/gateway/balance/{account} and …/balances-by-phone (M-Pesa / PHP mirror). Uses this country’s timezone for the daily cap.
smsGateway.perHour: Max lookups per hour (per account or per phone)
smsGateway.help: When exceeded, the API returns HTTP 429 so the gateway can back off. Defaults: 1/hour, 3/day.

deleteConfirm.title: Remove Override?
deleteConfirm.body: This will remove the rate override. The global rate will apply.
